title: Elden Ring
summary: A masterpiece of open-world design that earns every hour you put into it.
body: FromSoftware took everything that made their previous games great and wrapped it in a breathtaking open world. Every corner of the Lands Between rewards exploration, and the sense of discovery never fades.
pros: Massive open world full of secrets
verdict: One of the best games of the decade. If you have any interest in action RPGs, this is non-negotiable.
